arts.ttl: The Big Question: Have Liverpool opened door to Arsenal in title race?
arts.sum: Last season, Liverpool entered April top of the league and in a strong position to fight for the title before winning just two of their next seven games as their challenge quickly fell away. Excluding teams who benefited from games in hand, only two sides have come back from deficits of more than five points to win the Premier League after 24 or more games: Manchester United in 1995/96 and Man City in 2011/12.

arts.ttl: Liverpool can’t match our 100-point record – Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: City achieved the historic haul as they clinched the first of Guardiola’s six Premier League titles in 2017-18.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery vents his anger following Liverpool decision
arts.sum: The Aston Villa boss has seen more changes to the Villans' schedule be made this week and the Premier League have refused to move their upcoming clash with Liverpool to a later date

arts.ttl: Liverpool keeping tabs on highly-rated 21-year-old who “ticks boxes”
arts.sum: Whether or not Liverpool go on to win the Premier League or Champions League titles at the end of the current campaign, Arne Slot will surely be looking at who can come in this summer to help improve his squad in certain areas. Mo Salah’s agent has hinted at Slot’s brilliance, perhaps suggesting that his […] The post Liverpool keeping tabs on highly-rated 21-year-old who “ticks boxes” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool centre-back Ibrahima Konaté tempted by PSG move
arts.sum: Liverpool centre-back Ibrahima Konaté (25) is targeted by Ligue 1 champions PSG and the France international is tempted to return to his Parisian hometown, according to ESPN. Konaté is a Paris…

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid transfer twist as Vinicius Jr impacts Liverpool exit
arts.sum: Vinicius Jr is said to be the subject of reported transfer interest from the Saudi Pro League and is approaching the final two years of his Real Madrid contract

arts.ttl: 'Arne Slot is the world's best manager right now - he has blown everybody away'
arts.sum: Liverpool may have been beaten in the FA Cup last weekend and given up a lead at Everton in midweek, but make no mistake, Arne Slot is the world's best manager right now

arts.ttl: Arne Slot charged by The FA as they reveal reasons Michael Oliver showed him red card
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot was sent off after the final whistle during the midweek Merseyside derby at Goodison Park, following his confrontation with referee Michael Oliver - he has now been charged by The FA

arts.ttl: Man City 115 charges monster points deduction claim made as Liverpool wait goes on
arts.sum: Manchester City are found guilty and hit with relegation, points deductions or fines
